text: In the first moment, the emptiness and slightly skewed lines evoke a feeling of disorientation and anticipation; the sterile, silent corridor sharpens my awareness of my own presence. Stepping into the vibrant and information-rich space of the second scene, I feel curiosity awaken. The bold R+D wall and the digital displays invite exploration. Here, my mind shifts from uncertainty to engagement, noticing how the progression from a quiet corridor to a lively exhibition area mirrors the movement from ignorance to inquiry.
